hero.headline: Your money. Your language. Your server.
hero.subheadline: Multi-currency expense tracking that runs on your own hardware. No cloud lock-in, no subscriptions, no data sharing.

features.title: Built for Life Abroad
features.subtitle: Track spending in JPY, VND, USD—all in one place

dashboard.title: Net Worth at a Glance
dashboard.description: See balances across currencies and accounts on one screen

transactions.title: Import from Any Bank
transactions.description: CSV import from MoneyForward, Zaim, or any bank export

budget.title: AI-Generated Budgets
budget.description: Claude AI analyzes your spending to create personalized budgets

analytics.title: Know Where It Goes
analytics.description: Monthly trends and category breakdowns across all your currencies

step1.title: Import Data
step1.description: Upload CSV from your bank or finance app

step2.title: See the Picture
step2.description: Dashboards show where your money goes each month

step3.title: Get Smarter
step3.description: AI creates budgets and surfaces insights automatically

cta.title: Take Control of Your Finances
cta.subtitle: Self-hosted. Open source. Your data stays yours.
